tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: The Captcha Pro project is a comprehensive multi-platform captcha solution supporting slider puzzles, click verification, and invisible behavioral analysis. This monorepo provides packages for web (core), Vue 2/3, React, mini-programs (Taro, UniApp, WeChat), and native mobile SDKs (Android, iOS), alongside backend verification servers in Node.js, Java Spring Boot, and Go.

tour.title: Core Library Entry Point
tour.description: The main entry point exports all captcha classes (SliderCaptcha, ClickCaptcha, InvisibleCaptcha, PopupCaptcha), i18n utilities, type definitions, and factory functions. This file provides the public API surface for the platform-agnostic core library.

tour.title: Core Types and Utilities
tour.description: The type definitions establish the domain model and contracts used throughout the codebase. The utilities module provides shared functionality for encryption, randomization, and canvas operations that power all captcha implementations.

tour.title: Slider Captcha Implementation
tour.description: The slider captcha generates puzzle pieces with randomized positions, renders them on canvas with anti-bot textures, and verifies user drag movements against the target position. This is the most commonly used captcha type in the library.

tour.title: Click and Invisible Captcha
tour.description: The click captcha renders characters on canvas and validates user click positions. The invisible captcha monitors behavioral patterns like mouse movements and timing to calculate risk scores without explicit user challenges.

tour.title: Internationalization System
tour.description: The i18n module provides locale management, translation functions, and browser language detection. It supports Chinese (zh-CN) and English (en-US) out of the box and can be extended with additional locales.

tour.title: React Adapter Package
tour.description: The React package wraps the core captcha implementations with React components and hooks. It provides SliderCaptcha, ClickCaptcha, and PopupCaptcha components with full TypeScript support and props-based configuration.

tour.title: Vue 2 and Vue 3 Adapters
tour.description: The Vue packages provide component wrappers and mixins for reactive captcha integration. Vue 2 uses mixins while Vue 3 leverages the Composition API with composables for a more modern approach.

tour.title: Mini-Program Components
tour.description: The mini-program package provides cross-platform components for Taro, UniApp, and native WeChat miniprogram. Each platform has custom renderers and styles adapted to its canvas API and component model.

tour.title: Backend Verification Server
tour.description: The Node.js server provides REST API endpoints for captcha generation and verification. It implements AES-GCM encryption for secure client-server communication, rate limiting, and security management.
